name: FctsIdsPrmRateExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT PDRT_CK, PDRT_WHOS_AGE_IND, PDRT_TYPE, PDRT_EFF_DT, PDRT_TERM_DT, PDRT_PFX, PDRT_DESC, PDRT_MODIFIER, PDRT_MAX_CHILD, PDRT_BASIS, PDRT_KEY_STRUCT, PDRT_METH, PDRT_COL_STRUCT, PDRT_MOD_TYPE, PDRT_AGE_FROM, PDRT_AGE_THRU FROM CMC_PDRT_RATE_TBL

Description:
Â© Copyright 2008, 2009 Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas City

Called by:
                    FctsPrmRateExtrSeq

Processing:
                    Pulls the Premium Rating infromation that is used to populate the IDS Premium rating table within the Premium Rate Model. 
                    Dates are not used as a criteria for which records are pulled.   The whole table is extracted.

Control Job Rerun Information: 
                    Previous Run Successful:    Restart, no other steps necessary
                    Previous Run Aborted:         Restart, no other steps necessary
